lenders.description: All legal entities or individuals providing credit facilities under this agreement, including initial lenders and any assignees

administrative_agent.description: The financial institution designated to administer the credit facilities, manage payments, and coordinate between borrower and lenders

borrower.description: The legal entity receiving the credit facility and obligated to repay borrowed amounts plus interest

lead_arranger.description: The financial institution(s) responsible for structuring, underwriting, and syndicating the credit facility

agreement_date.description: Effective date when the credit agreement becomes binding. Return in YYYY-MM-DD format.

maturity_date.description: Final date by which all outstanding principal and interest must be repaid. If specified relatively (e.g., 'three years from the effective date'), calculate the absolute date. Return in YYYY-MM-DD format.

beneficial_ownership_certification_requi.description: Whether the agreement explicitly mandates submission of FinCEN Form 314(b) or equivalent beneficial ownership documentation

governing_law.description: The jurisdiction whose laws govern interpretation and enforcement of the agreement (e.g., 'State of New York', 'England and Wales')

amount.description: Total aggregate principal amount available for borrowing across all facilities

currency.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

loan_commitment.description: Total loan commitment under the credit agreement

use_of_proceeds.description: Permitted purposes for which borrowed funds may be used, as specified in the agreement

borrowing_request.description: Required notice period and submission method for the borrower to request a drawdown (e.g., '3 business days prior via written notice to Administrative Agent')

authorized_officer_definition.description: Specific roles, titles, or positions of individuals empowered to execute documents and make binding decisions on behalf of the borrower

terms.description: All terms, conditions, dates, and financial details
